programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall

programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Drew Peterson: Killer Charm
programme.desc: In 2007, Stacy Peterson, the wife of veteran police sergeant Drew Peterson, goes missing. As police launch an intensive search to find her the case of the missing mother raises shocking new questions about the death of Peterson's third wife years earlier.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Billboard Installer
programme.desc: Mike Rowe teams up with an outdoor advertising company in Texas that teaches the tricks of a very dirty trade.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Date Palm Pollenator
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs where he collects pollen from male date palm pods and pollinates female trees. He also shows never before seen footage and answers viewer mail.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Chicken Busters
programme.desc: Mike spends the day working with the Chicken Busters, chasing and catching feral chickens. Then he answers a fan letter about the familial bond often rooted within the jobs he works.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Worm Grunter
programme.desc: Mike heads out to Florida to harvest some clams and then takes on some worm grunting in the Apalachicola National Forest.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Barber
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and the crew travel to the Spring Brook Ranch in Kalispell, Montana to join forces with a yak and bison rancher who put him to work.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dirty Jobs of the Big Apple
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty in the Big Apple after climbing atop a building to clean the water tower.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Reindeer Farm
programme.desc: Mike heads to Kentucky to try shrink wrapping a houseboat, and then he heads off to Alaska to spend the day at a reindeer farm.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sewer Inspector
programme.desc: Mike joins a sewer inspector on patrol, braving the cockroach and rat-infested sewers of San Francisco. Then he helps a disaster clean-up crew after a Brooklyn toilet explodes from sewer backup and does some backbreaking work at a demolition company.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Turkey Farmer
programme.desc: Mike examines the short lives of turkeys as they make their way from farm to sandwich. Then, it's off to a potato farm, where Mike digs in the dirt for colourful taters that will revolutionize fries. He removes sewage from a water treatment plant as well.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Hoof Cleaner
programme.desc: Joining a crew at a rock query, Mike Rowe gets hip deep in mud and muck working with the hippo keepers at the Adventure Aquarium. Mike also gets the opportunity to address some bovine foot problems.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Welcome to Treasure Island
programme.desc: Twelve ordinary people must figure out how to survive on an uninhabited island. with just a few tools and a day's supply of water.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: Firefighters survive a massive explosion, warheads explode in a Korean tunnel, an avalanche buries a city in Norway, a 100-foot crane collapse narrowly misses workers, and a racecar snaps in half at 310 miles per hour.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: American Original
programme.desc: The bass are biting in Oklahoma.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Dry Tortugas, FL Keys - Light Tackle/Huge Bottom Fish
programme.desc: Light spin tackle for oversized bottom fish off the Dry Tortugas.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: A Day In The Life
programme.desc: On a typical day of Ali and Rush, Rush preps for the season, and Ali rounds up a friend to check local hot spots.

programme.title: Into the Blue: Tuna Time
programme.desc: Scott and Steve search for big tuna.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience: Cuda on the Rubble Pile
programme.desc: The captains take advantage of limited time and make a short trip to a nearby man-mad haven for the ferocious barracuda.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: No Sancocho Sailfish Shootout
programme.desc: Rick is at a billfish tournament at Casa Vieja Lodge in Guatemala.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Quest for King Arthur
programme.desc: Josh scours England, Wales, and Scotland to find the real life King Arthur.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Kidd's Treasure
programme.desc: Josh retraces the footsteps of the legendary Captain Kidd in the hopes of finding his buried treasure. From the East Coast to the Caribbean, the search takes him to a real pirate shipwreck and to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Avid outdoorsman Trenton and novice survivalist Jen take on high elevation in the peaks of Udhampur, India. With relentlessly cold nights and an unexpected wildfire, their chances of surviving the 21-day challenge might go up in flames.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dunes of Despair
programme.desc: A laid back wilderness instructor and his go-getter 'wild child' survival mate are dropped onto the sun-scorched, desolate sand dunes of Brazil. In this bleak landscape of blinding white sand, they battle hunger, dehydration and, ultimately, each other.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Prison of Garbage
programme.desc: Deborah and Mary both started hoarding in the wake of a personal tragedy. After Deborah killed her drug-addicted boyfriend in self-defence, she and her son have lived amid growing piles of trash and unused possessions.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Nowhere Near Normal
programme.desc: Extreme Hoarder Jahn struggles to clear her belongings from two houses before both are condemned.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: My Teeth Are Lost in the Pile
programme.desc: When Kyle first met Lynn, he thought she was the answer to all of his problems, but years later, she's transformed his home into a heap of trash. Now on the verge of foreclosure, the couple will either get along enough to clean, or kill each other trying.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's My Junk
programme.desc: When Eileen admits a dark secret to her family, the situation quickly escalates beyond hoarding to a matter of life and death. Compulsive hoarder Dale has packed not one, but five houses full of clutter.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: She's Going to Jail
programme.desc: Joanne's hoarding is so extreme that the city has already sent her to jail four times.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Leading a Double Life
programme.desc: A family suffers the effects of mould, mice and flea infestations because their upstairs neighbor and landlord has acquired one of the show's most massive hoards to date.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: This Is Unreal
programme.desc: After losing his mother, Milton's shopping became a compulsion that soon took over his life.

programme.desc: D.J.'s happy homecoming from Spain is upset when her sisters end-up in New Zealand.

programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary Lynn

programme.desc: Randy's boardwalk memorabilia collection fills a 20,000 square foot building and numerous tractor trailers. Vicki's hoarding is breaking up her family.

programme.desc: Lloyd faces $150,000 in fines if he doesn't clean up his property; Carol's husband will leave her for good if she doesn't clean up her act.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Genetically re-created dinosaurs break out of captivity and wreak havoc in a theme park.

programme.title: Movie: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Dr. Ian Malcolm follows his girlfriend to an island inhabited by dinosaurs to study them in their natural habitat. Disaster strikes and the group find themselves in the ultimate fight for survival.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A wealthy couple's son goes missing on a remote island full of dinosaurs. The couple tricks a paleontologist into going back and helping them find their son, but things don't go according to plan.

programme.title: Movie: Office Space
programme.desc: A computer programmer's sudden professional nonchalance leads to bizarre success.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Leslie tries to convince Chris and Ben to give the parks department more money, but when she fails to persuade them, she enlists Ann's help. Meanwhile, Ron and Andy coach youth basketball.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Flu Season
programme.desc: While planning for a local festival, Leslie is struck hard with the flu and ends up in the hospital.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Time Capsule
programme.desc: Leslie wants to bury a time capsule that showcases life in Pawnee, but is thrown off by an odd suggestion.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammy: Part Two
programme.desc: Tom tries to get back at Ron by going on a date with his ex-wife, Tammy. Leslie tries to prevent Ron from falling for Tammy's charming ways.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Media Blitz
programme.desc: Leslie does a series of interviews while trying to get the word out about the Harvest Festival. A media storm ensues when Ben has to answer questions about his past as a teen mayor.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Indianapolis
programme.desc: Leslie and Ron head to Indianapolis to receive a commendation for the upcoming Harvest Festival.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Harvest Festival
programme.desc: With the fate of her entire department hinging on the success of Harvest Festival, Leslie must deal with last-minute problems including a tribal leader who is threatening to put a curse on the entire event.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Camping
programme.desc: Leslie takes the whole department camping in order to brainstorm new ideas.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Fancy Party
programme.desc: Andy and April host a dinner party for all of their friends; Ben asks Leslie for some career advice.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Soulmates
programme.desc: Ann convinces Leslie to sign up for an online dating service, only to be matched with someone she already knows.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Jerry's Painting
programme.desc: Jerry's contribution to Leslie's community arts show causes a stir. Ben moves in with April and Andy in order to teach them how to behave like adults.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Eagleton
programme.desc: When the neighbouring city of Eagleton erects a fence around one of their parks, Leslie must get her former best friend to take it down.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Fight
programme.desc: When Leslie tries to get Anne a job at City Hall, Anne's lukewarm reaction causes their first fight. Tom invites the entire department to the Snakehole Lounge to promote his new drink.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Road Trip
programme.desc: When Chris sends Leslie and Ben to Indianapolis, Leslie is worried she will make a move on Ben. Ron teaches a young student about his views on government.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Bubble
programme.desc: Everyone in the office is unhappy when Chris decides to make some big changes in the parks department.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Li'l Sebastian
programme.desc: Leslie and the parks team put together a memorial service for a dearly departed friend. Meanwhile, Tom makes a big life decision.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: I'm Leslie Knope
programme.desc: Leslie must choose to either break up with Ben or follow her dream of running for office. Ann is forced to make an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammys
programme.desc: Leslie is forced to intervene when Tammy One re-enters Ron's life and begins controlling his every move.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Born and Raised
programme.desc: Leslie falls prey to some 'gotcha' journalism while promoting her new book. Ann is determined to bond with Ron and April.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pawnee Rangers
programme.desc: In an effort to protest the inequality of Ron's boys-only trip, Leslie takes the girls on a trip of their own.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Meet N' Greet
programme.desc: Andy and April decide to throw a Halloween party at their house, which upsets Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: End of the World
programme.desc: A local Pawnee group predicts that the end of the world is coming, causing Leslie and the others to contemplate their lives.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Genetically re-created dinosaurs break out of captivity and wreak havoc in a theme park.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple D Takes On Triple G ... Again!
programme.desc: Creating the ultimate diner dish should be easy for Triple D chefs, but a strict weight limit on ingredients makes this challenge heavy duty. Then, who has time to figure out what Guy's favorite dish is when you only get a few minutes to shop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Road Show
programme.desc: Guy is tucking in the napkin and getting into some righteous barbecue. In Dallas, the barbecue stand tucked into a farmers' market is dishing out classic beef brisket and Carolina pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: College-Town Champs
programme.desc: Guy visits Columbus, Ohio for pierogies and a barbeque truck and Boulder, Colorado for noodles and chicken from a Thai restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Favorites With a Twist
programme.desc: Guy visits places with a new take on old favourites such as a huge caramel pecan roll.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ocean Coasts and Great Lakes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from coast to coast and to the Great Lakes to dig up some dynamite dishes. In Los Angeles, a Mexican joint in Grand Central Market serves outrageous octopus tostadas and puts a lights-out spin on a burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Sammies
programme.desc: A food truck shuckin' and frying oysters for a po boy in Vancouver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Style
programme.desc: Two Providence brothers create new family classics including BBQ chicken-stuffed ravioli.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh, Filled and Fried
programme.desc: Guy crosses the country looking for scratch cooking done right, including fried empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecued, Baked and Brined
programme.desc: Guy visits three joints doing scratch cooking their way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Found 'Em
programme.desc: Guy goes to a drive-in in Kentucky that's serving the same burgers as they did in 1951.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Quirky Classics
programme.desc: Guy enjoys some one-of-a-kind meals like cajun oysters Rockefeller and burgers slathered with a remoulade called goo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Their Own Way
programme.desc: Guy meets cooks doing things their own way in Flagstaff Arizona.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Whole Lotta Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into hearty helpings of comfort starting with a soul food spot dishing out Southern seafood and killer fried chicken in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast
programme.desc: Guy visits a California joint to try spicy pork and knockout gnocchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavor Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a culinary trip filled with adventurous flavour. In Los Angeles, a funky spot is all about filling bowls with eclectic eats. In Norfolk, Virginia, a market and restaurant has Mexican specialties that you probably haven't seen before.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Brisket to Bison
programme.desc: It's all about the meat as Guy Fieri crosses the country to stop at some of his favorite haunts. In Denver, a Native American eatery has a new way to serve bison, and a Nashville diner is taking lamb to the next level. Plus, Guy snoops around Yellowstone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Stuffed Stuff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows it's what's on the inside that counts and these top spots in the Triple D Nation really know how to stuff the good stuff in. Like in Eureka, Calif., where a chef is cramming calamari with shrimp and leeks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Between The Bread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's always down for a good sandwich, so he's stopping in to check out some of the Triple D Nation's latest creations. A food truck in Nashville put down roots and started churning out cheesy concoctions.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Family Fun Day
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a fun and cost-effective family celebration complete with simple outdoor games and a menu that appeals to both the little ones and the grown-ups. Recipes include juicy Lucy slider bar and crispy potato nests.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bobby Loves Biscuits
programme.desc: This bicuit bonanza includes biscuit French toast with cinnamon orange cane syrup, chilled bourbon vanilla latte, ham, tomato and cheddar sandwiches, and a doughnut with lemon cream filling and blueberry sauce.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Liquor Store Secrets
programme.desc: Ina's unlocking her liquor store secrets and easy techniques that take red wine-braised short ribs, fennel soup gratin and an awesome fresh apple spice cake to the next level.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Tom's Hometown Favorites
programme.desc: Valerie surprises her Midwestern husband Tom with some of his Ohio favorites. Ohio turkey chili, fried bologna bites with pickled squash, tomato and bibb lettuce salad and vanilla and coffee cream puffs are all on the menu.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Well Done, Dad
programme.desc: Ree brings her dad a celebration meal with all of his favorite foods. A luxurious, slow-cooked burgundy beef stew, creamy cheese grits casserole and super-tasty blistered green beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Two Ranchers and Ree
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making lunch for two of her favourite ranchers, her husband, Ladd, and his dad, Chuck. She starts with her father-in-law's favorite, Chuck's Shrimp Brochettes, and the aptly named Greatest Quesadillas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner for Dad
programme.desc: Ree's home alone and throwing an impromptu dinner party for her dad and stepmom. She's making her dad's favorites including steak Oscar and roasted asparagus.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home Part 5
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is whipping up fantastic five-ingredient dishes with the help of her kid film crew. Her husband, Ladd, shares his input as she makes fast and fabulous Bruschetta Chicken, a spin on a favorite appetizer.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Insane Salads
programme.desc: Molly shares insane salads including individual candy bar salads that will blow your dessert mind and a juicy steak salad with Za'atar chimichurri. She also creates two make-ahead salads including one that's eight layers high.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: The Bertinelli Boys Are Back in Town
programme.desc: Valerie is refreshing classic diner fare in a meal for her brothers, David and Patrick, and her nephew, Enzo.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his talented chef friends to take a burger beyond the basic patty and bun. Antonia Lofaso combines sirloin and brisket with braised oxtail for an intensely meaty burger and whips orange juice for a crisp Garibaldi cocktail.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Dad's Sticky Ribs and Decadent Cookies
programme.desc: Michael turns the backyard grill into a smoker to make his dad's favourite sticky ribs. Then, he makes grilled potato salad as his wife turns his dad's obsession with chocolate into giant cookies infuses with chocolate, crunchy pretzel and sea salt.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Dishes for Dad
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating dads everywhere pop-pleasing dishes like Sunny's pulled pork eggs benedict and Katie Lee's breakfast sausage eggs and cheeseburgers. Jeff's father, Gus Mauro, stops by to help make cheesesteak tacos. The host share gift ideas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Guy us diving deep into beloved neighborhoods across the country to check out some local hot spots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Spectacular
programme.desc: Guy is celebrating southern home cooking from collards and grits in South Carolina to homemade biscuits in Oregon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Flavor Faves
programme.desc: Check out some of Guy's favourite spots serving up all kinds of traditional ethnic dishes including hand-pulled Chinese noodles from Peaceful Restaurant, to quesadillas and tortas at Nopalito, and Guamanian classics at PDX 671.

programme.desc: The Titans are told to forget about pursuing their dreams and find regular, ordinary jobs. Thanks, Robin.

programme.title: American Dad!: The Census of the Lambs
programme.desc: Hayley and Stan compete while collecting data for the US census. Klaus inherits a camera and has Steve and his friends model for him.

programme.title: American Dad!: Shell Game
programme.desc: Steve sets out to stop Roger after he joins a mysterious order. Francine buys a new pasta sauce and the family starts changing.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Lice Things Are Lice

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Never Ricking Morty
programme.desc: Morty is dragged into the intergalactic adventures of his alcoholic grandfather, Rick.

programme.title: Family Guy: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: When Chris learns that he is the heir to Carter's fortune but refuses to take the money, Peter takes drastic measures to keep the wealth in the family.

programme.title: Family Guy: Secondhand Spoke
programme.desc: Peter takes up smoking cigarettes, and is approached by Mr. Stone, an advertising executive who wants Peter to be the face of his anti-smoking campaign under the caveat that Peter continues to smoke.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Japanese Hero Billboard Chart
programme.desc: The top ten heroes make an appearance for the Japanese Hero Billboard Chart rankings.

programme.title: Paranoia Agent
programme.desc: A mysterious boy on rollerblades has been attacking people in Tokyo.

programme.title: Mob Psycho 100: Exaltation: I’ve Obtained Loss
programme.desc: Salt Middle School undergoes deep cleaning lead by the student council president Kamuro and one thug after another gets targeted. Meanwhile the story about Mob defeating the shadow leader get embellished and takes on a life of its own.

programme.title: Black Clover: As Pitch Black as It Gets
programme.desc: Asta's Black Asta form does him no favours in the court of Damnatio Kira. It's up to a powerful few to save Asta's head from the chopping block.

programme.title: Ballmastrz: 9009: Breathe Deep to Win: Teamwork Cuts Through the Foul Odor of Obsession
programme.desc: When a stinky stalker torments The Leptons, they enlist the help of a former foe.

programme.desc: A search for lucrative sports memorabilia leads Ace, Gaz, and Babyball to the lair of an Ulsa Guerin wise guy.

programme.desc: Temari leads the attack on the Third Raikage using Wind Style, but even her strongest jutsu is not enough to penetrate the Raikage's invincible armor.

programme.desc: Makasu defeats religious pantheons in sports and steals their mystical artifacts.

programme.title: The Boondocks: The New Black
programme.desc: Riley becomes the maligned target of gay rights groups after he calls his classmate 'gay.' In these sensitive times when everyone is offended by everything, Riley really has to watch what he says, even when his apology may upset people.

programme.title: The Venture Bros.: The Unicorn in Captivity
programme.desc: Dr. Venture’s latest invention is a real game-changer and the new game is deadly.

programme.title: Aqua TV Show Show: Skins

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Lice Things Are Lice

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Craig and the Kid's Table

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Escape from Family Dinner
programme.desc: There's a huge water balloon fight at the creek but Craig is stuck at home for a family dinner, unless he can escape.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Power Punchers
programme.desc: Fed up with losing in video games to his Dad, Craig seeks training in the Creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Monster in the Garden
programme.desc: Craig is determined to catch the monster that has been wreaking havoc in Granddad's garden.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Dog Decider
programme.desc: Unable to make tough decisions, Craig decides to put his choices in the hands of a dog named Fred.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Kelsey Quest
programme.desc: Kelsey accepts a quest from the Elders of the Creek, but she might not be ready for her terrifying opponent.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Climb
programme.desc: Craig’s phone gets stuck in Mt. Sycamore, the tallest tree in the creek!

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Kid From 3030
programme.desc: The kids meet a mysterious kid from the future and try to help him complete his mission.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Itch to Explore
programme.desc: When Craig sets out to map the entire creek, he and his friends end up in the treacherous Poison Ivy Grove.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Dinner at the Creek
programme.desc: Bernard is left in charge for the evening, so Craig sets out to find his own dinner at the creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Bug City
programme.desc: Craig discovers a bunch of bugs under a rock and decides to build them a city.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Fort Williams
programme.desc: Craig and his mom build the biggest blanket fort in the world.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Sour Candy Trials

programme.desc: Craig takes his cousin, Bryson, to the Creek, and accidentally starts a water balloon war.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Evolution of Craig
programme.desc: Craig rescues a tadpole and decides to raise him into a level 100 frog!

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Ancients of the Creek

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Children of the Dog

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court
programme.desc: Walden and Alan throw Marty a bachelor party after he proposes to Evelyn, and his best friends help him celebrate his last days of bachelorhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Fingers of Crème de Menthe
programme.desc: Alan learns that Lyndsey broke up with Larry and didn't tell him. Meanwhile, Walden sets out to prove that he's a man's man.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: How to Get Rid of Alan Harper
programme.desc: Walden suspects his new girlfriend is cheating on him. Meanwhile, Alan gets even more intertwined in Lyndsey and Larry's relationship when he starts dating Larry's sister, Gretchen.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Welcome Home, Jake
programme.desc: Lyndsey discovers that Alan is sleeping with Larry's sister, Gretchen. Meanwhile, Walden struggles with telling Barry to find his own place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: West Side Story
programme.desc: Walden gets an invitation to his ex-girlfriends' boutique opening. Meanwhile, Gretchen wants to spend more time at Alan's house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lan Mao Shi Zai Wuding Shang
programme.desc: Walden reconnects with Kate and is sure she's 'the one' that is, until he meets Vivian and becomes convinced she's 'the one.' Meanwhile, Alan and Gretchen grow closer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lotta Delis in Little Armenia
programme.desc: Alan stumbles upon an opportunity to make money. Meanwhile, Walden has to address his co-dependency issues.

programme.desc: Alan's girlfriend insists he confess his true identity to Larry, and Walden goes on a road trip with Jenny and Barry.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Ol' Mexican Spinach

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Scream

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Supertramp

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches
programme.desc: Peaches, a two-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador. A nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit. Plus, Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: Hog Chase Rescue
programme.desc: Dan races to North Carolina to rescue a group of pigs from horrific living conditions and discovers that one of the pigs is pregnant. Later, the organization's new sign is displayed, making their transformation official.

programme.title: The Great American Groom-A-Long
programme.desc: Carson Kressley pairs dog-grooming professionals with friends and celebs such as Apolo Ohno, Dennis Quaid and Aubrey O'Day. Together, they and the rest of America learn how to transform shaggy canines into fabulous pooches, despite being stuck at home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: The Parkers: Et Tu, Andell?

programme.title: House of Payne: Can I Get a Witness?
programme.desc: Ella learns that she has a lump in her breast. Meanwhile, Calvin thinks he has to go into the witness protection program.

programme.title: House of Payne: Commencement Day
programme.desc: Calvin finds out that he's graduating from college and tells everyone and later learns that the school made a mistake.

programme.title: House of Payne: A Shock to the System
programme.desc: Kevin, a friend of Malik's, is hit by a car while staying over at the Payne's and Malik has to deal with the possibility of losing his friend. Meanwhile, Calvin gets a job and then gets fired.

programme.title: Martin: Kill Him with Kindness
programme.desc: Martin thinks Gina wants to kill him for life insurance money.

programme.title: Martin: Blow, Baby, Blow
programme.desc: When music producer Biggie Smalls comes to town, everybody wants to be a star.

programme.title: Martin: Ring a Ding, Ding, Ding Gone
programme.desc: Martin takes off his wedding ring when his pals complain that it scares off women, but he's the frightened one when he has to explain its loss to Gina.

programme.title: Martin: Love T.K.O.
programme.desc: Martin and Gina's romantic weekend gets interrupted by everyone else's love woes.

programme.title: Black-ish: Rock, Paper, Scissors, Gun
programme.desc: After a break-in down the block, Dre talks about getting a gun, but Bow is not comfortable with the idea, which leads everyone to debate the many different ways to protect your family.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dr. Hell No
programme.desc: After Dre gets his yearly physical and comes home traumatized, Pops explains his generation's strong aversion towards healthcare and admits that he hasn't seen a doctor in years.

programme.title: Black-ish: Daddy's Day
programme.desc: After another lackluster Father's Day overshadowed by graduation parties and summer vacations, Dre and his colleagues decide to come up with a holiday initiative entitled 'Daddy's Day,' celebrating everything that Father's Day is not.

programme.title: Black-ish: Churched
programme.desc: In the Johnson home, Sundays involve SAT prep and sports, so when the family is invited to Church on Sunday by the neighbours, Dre goes against his instinct of always saying 'no' and agrees.

programme.title: Black-ish: Jacked o' Lantern
programme.desc: Ever since he was a kid, Dre has loved Halloween. Now that he lives in one of those 'good candy neighborhoods,' kids come from all over the city to trick-or-treat, including Dre’s own nieces and nephews.

programme.title: Black-ish: Charlie in Charge
programme.desc: While Dre and Bow take Zoey on a trip to visit Bow's alma mater, Brown University, Dre battles with his fear of flying through a little pharmaceutical assistance to get him through the flight.

programme.title: Black-ish: Chop Shop
programme.desc: While Bow prepares for the Johnson family's annual Christmas card shoot, Dre takes Junior and Jack to the Barber Shop to get a haircut from his lifelong Barber, T.

programme.title: Black-ish: Man at Work
programme.desc: Dre has always looked out for the crew he grew up with, but when his childhood friend Sha comes to stay at the house for a few days, Bow thinks he is taking advantage of Dre's generosity.

programme.title: Black-ish: Road to a Championship

programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.desc: Some of the strategies for survival in Madagascar's dry south are ingenious.

programme.title: Borneo's Secret Kingdom: Forest of the Flying Snakes

programme.desc: Borneo’s Kinabatangan River drives life to its limits with its powerful forces.

programme.title: Wild Sri Lanka: Monkey in the Clouds

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Elephant Forest
programme.desc: In Central Thailands forests, fertile plains and even city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Monkey Kingdom

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Doomsday Beasts
programme.desc: Bizarre markings are observed from space in oceans and deserts across the planet. Strange sightings point to conspiracies that could have global repercussions.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder in the Mortuary

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Killer Unveiled
programme.desc: September 9, 2002. Husband and father, Tom Bragg, is found brutally murdered. A kind and well-liked man, his community struggles to think who wanted him dead. But when police take a closer look at his life and relationships, a deadly picture emerges.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Candy Run
programme.desc: A family's nightmare begins in September 2014 when 8-year-old Hiawayi Robinson leaves her apartment to play but never returns. The desperate search to find her leads investigators to surveillance footage that sends shockwaves through the community.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Terror After Midnight
programme.desc: A young Hollywood celebrity is out celebrating her birthday, and another young woman enjoys a late drink with friends. Just a few hours later, they both end up dead.

programme.desc: A couple wakes up to find their baby's crib empty. They are certain she has been kidnapped. But many believe the parents are the culprits.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: She was the bright, bubbly cheerleader. He was the football star. Teen sweethearts whose on-again, off-again relationship would end when one of them was found murdered.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: My Father BTK
programme.desc: A serial killer who escapes justice for 30 years. The community that never forgets. The law enforcement officers who set the trap to catch him, and his daughter who tells of the father she knew and the heartbreaking realization he was the BTK killer.

programme.title: Family Man, Family Murderer: An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When pregnant Colorado mom, Shanann Watts and her two daughters vanish without a trace, her husband Chris pleads for his family's safe return. But as the investigation digs deeper, dark secrets are revealed and Chris transforms from family man to monster.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Blood Money
programme.desc: John joins police on a strange and twisting missing persons case that turns fatal, sending investigators on the trail of Alejandro Castillo; Cal takes on the case of Leticia Smith, a woman on the run from a terrible crime with nothing to lose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a sexual predator is discovered hiding in plain sight, John helps police in the pursuit of dangerous James Meece; after a brutal home invasion, Cal goes into the field to help police track down the dangerous James Watts.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: John joins the hunt for prominent community members Torin and Rena Smith, who absconded from justice after being accused of shocking crimes; Cal pulls back the curtain on Carnell Spencer Lee Jr., a vicious criminal with a dark and menacing past.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Violent Vendetta
programme.desc: A family feud escalates to brutal violence and John joins police in pursuit of Top Ten FBI fugitive Eugene Palmer; Callahan immerses himself in one of the most brutal cases he's ever seen as he helps authorities track down Tamera Williams.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Tragic Entanglement
programme.desc: Luis Frias makes John Walsh's personal most wanted list when Frias allegedly murders his common-law wife in front of their kids. Then, Callahan Walsh explores a bizarre case: Harold 'Butch' Knight leaves clues after confessing to killing his wife.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice. Then Police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: On the night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods. Can police rescue him before it's too late?

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: Tony and Paul help a couple build their dream pool to go along with their newly built outdoor entertaining space. The guys are challenged to design around a giant concrete slab by creating a feature-packed pool that fits with the new space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rocky Road to Backyard Bliss
programme.desc: A Nashville family is ready for Kyle and Justin to build the perfect pool in their backyard. The project gets off to a rocky start, but the Poll Kings deliver a phenomenal backyard complete with a massive waterfall and beautiful pavilion.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Eyesore to Elegance
programme.desc: After renovating a fixer-upper into their dream home, a couple is ready to add the final touch by restoring the old pool. Paul and Brian Porter create a modern oasis by adding an infinity edge spa, fire bowls and a luxury barbecue area.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kinds design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Archie

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Orleans
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the Big Easy where the food and the culture are a mix of southern tradition and modern influence.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida
programme.desc: Get away from Florida's big cities and beaches to delve into the interior part of the state where the people and the food have an identity all of their own.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco
programme.desc: Look no further than San Francisco, California for the best eating on the West Coast. Built on classics like Dungeness Crab Louie and sourdough bread, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the City by the Bay so delectable.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Annihilated
programme.desc: When a young woman is raped and murdered, detectives believe her fiancé was also targeted.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Alternate

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Crush
programme.desc: Detective Stabler's daughter Kathleen is called in to help with an investigation when a teenager is brutally beaten after her nude photos are spread throughout her school.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Turmoil
programme.desc: Photos are leaked onto the internet of a 15-year-old rape victim making the case more difficult. Stabler's son becomes involved in compromising events that takes Stabler away from the case at hand.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Gray
programme.desc: Stabler goes to his daughter's university to discuss rape prevention at a Take Back the Night rally, when a girl from the crowd accuses another student of rape.

programme.title: Modern Family: Chirp

programme.title: Modern Family: Someone to Watch Over Lily

programme.title: Modern Family: Fulgencio
programme.desc: Gloria's mom and sister make the voyage from Colombia with baby names and family baggage. No one feels that Phil is able to help with the kids' problems, but there may be a method to his madness.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Future Dunphys
programme.desc: When Phil takes Claire to the hospital for her angiogram, they encounter a family that is basically their future selves, and they're not sure they like what they see. Manny drags Jay on a visit to a prospective private school.

programme.title: Modern Family: Career Day
programme.desc: Phil is jazzed to share the wonders of residential real estate with Luke and Manny’s classmates for career day, but unfortunately for Phil, his nemesis, Gil Thorpe, shows up and things get ugly.

programme.title: Modern Family: We Need to Talk About Lily
programme.desc: Phil may have conquered his biggest real estate challenge when he thinks he found Pepper his dream home. Meanwhile, in an attempt to connect with Lily, Mitch and Cam get invited to an exclusive event for her favourite vlogger.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wanderlust

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Uncivilized
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the sexual assault and murder of a young boy.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wrong Is Right

programme.desc: A winery owner travels to Paris for a major wine competition. She hopes her latest vintage will bring her numerous awards and accolades so she can make her father proud. While at the competition, she meets a man and starts a Parisian romance.

programme.title: The Closer: The Big Bang
programme.desc: The shooting death of a man taking pictures of the stars from his balcony leads the squad to look closely at the husband of the woman with whom the victim was having an affair. The investigation is hindered by a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: The Closer: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Captain Raydor accompanies Brenda on an investigation involving the disappearance of a nanny working for close friends of the mayor. They discover that what they may have on their hands is a serial rapist armed with a stun gun.

programme.title: The Closer: In Custody
programme.desc: While investigating a suspicious suicide, the squad wades into a nasty child-custody dispute between a dying man and his meth-addicted ex-wife. Meanwhile, Pope applies for the police chief job.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Bring the Pain
programme.desc: Meredith and Dr. Shepherd have to use more than medicine when a young woman's traditionalist, religious father forbids her to have a life-saving operation. Meanwhile, George and Alex are forced to perform surgery under less than ideal conditions.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Into You Like a Train
programme.desc: As Meredith awaits a decision from Derek, her angst is interrupted when a train crash brings injured patients to the hospital. When Addison Shepherd notes Izzie's potential, Izzie must choose between professional gain and her friendship with Meredith.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Something to Talk About
programme.desc: Cristina, Izzie and Meredith pursue the case of Shane, a male patient who seems to have a hysterical pregnancy, which fascinates them and the entire medical staff. Elsewhere, a young patient inspires Alex to better express his feelings for Izzie.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Let It Be
programme.desc: Derek and Addison Shepherd's professional relationship is challenged when their closest friends come to the hospital seeking a pre-emptive operation to avoid breast and ovarian cancer. George can't understand why a patient is unhappy to survive a fall.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Thanks for the Memories
programme.desc: The Thanksgiving holiday is more difficult for the interns and residents than any of them are willing to admit. Izzie plans a dinner at Meredith's but it remains to be seen who will show up. George endures the O'Malley tradition of hunting turkey.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Much Too Much
programme.desc: Meredith is mortified when her 'one night stand' shows up at the hospital in need of medical attention; a woman carrying quintuplets is overwhelmed by numerous medical issues as she navigates her high-risk pregnancy; Alex's shortcomings frustrate Izzie.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.desc: After self-banishing, Kate is slammed by Africa's wrath. Desperately hungry, Bulent gets a major score with his bare hands but Makani must put aside her vegan beliefs. Wes and Gwen's first big food win goes wrong, threatening their health and challenge.

programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.desc: The Debertis build an epic Rockcrawler. Brad's first asphalt race leads to a valuable lesson when he's involved in a high-speed crash.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Race to the Finish
programme.desc: The Debertis build a beastly rock-crawler on spec hoping for a big payday to fund Brad's racing career. Joey Logano coaches Brad before the biggest race of the season and Brad's best chance at getting a sponsor.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Prepare for Liftoff
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers continue transforming their junkyard Bronco into an off-road beast for the Tuff Truck rematch against the Goons and Welder Up. Heavy D customizes a brand new UTV for his friend to break a world record at the live event.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Monster Jump Live
programme.desc: A salute to the military with this action-packed night of insane stunts. Heavy D hopes to make history by jumping the Brodozer over a flying airplane, while Diesel Dave, the Muscle, and others attempts stunts of their own.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Brothers Vs. The World
programme.desc: Get ready for a crazy night featuring an epic Blazer build, a wild race against a Lamborghini and a record breaking stunt. Then, a huge announcement with the Dirty Mudder Truckers.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Blazer of Glory
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers complete their transformation on an old K5 Blazer and square body truck bed into the ultimate diesel-powered party on wheels. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave convinces Heavy D to give his El Camino what she needs to get back on the road.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Don't Tread on Diesel
programme.desc: Heavy D puts the petal to the metal on his next SEMA build: a 6x6 with a custom full-track assembly that can handle any terrain in style. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave adds the finishing touches to his dream El Camino before revealing it at Monster Jam.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Detroit Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: Heavy D begins converting a Vietnam-era bridge boat into the world's first-ever diesel-powered surf boat.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Get Pitted

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Sooner Than Later
programme.desc: After a grueling night against St. Louis, MSO gets a callout from some Oklahoma Racers who want to challenge Memphis on the same sketchy street. JJ and the crew aren't ready to back down but they must rally to make staying out another night worthwhile.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Second City Hustlers
programme.desc: As their battle with Chicago approaches, the MSO scrambles to fix Heifer after losing her to a fender bender. JJ finds a '65 Malibu they can use, but Chicago is stacked with fast cars and street sense, so running an unknown may be out of the question.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Yeager Bombs

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Northwest Law: Boats and Does

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Man with No Name

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hit the Ground Hunting

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Price of Freedom

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Two Kills

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Regrets

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunter Is Hunted

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Wrath

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hard Choices
programme.desc: Heimo is desperate to get a moose for winter. Charlie and Tyler have to overcome fire damage on their traplines.

programme.title: Big Break: Myrtle Beach: A Putt for the Win
