programme.title: Pawn Stars: Trail Breaker
programme.desc: The guys look to buy a classic motorcycle and Rick hesitates when buying a rare coin.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wouldn't It Be Ice?
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee read the fine print when an original signed copy of Wayne Gretzky's NHL contract skates into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: To the Moon
programme.desc: A limousine formerly owned by Jackie Gleason pulls up. A football signed by the winners of the first Superbowl spirals into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Comfortably Chum
programme.desc: A big-time car dealer drops by the shop, and Rick's negotiation skills are put to the test.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mini Rick
programme.desc: A broadside from the civil war era comes into the shop as well as a 1947 fully restored Wurlitzer jukebox. Later, Rick gets frustrated when Chumlee brings a child to the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wilde Card
programme.desc: Read between the lines with the Pawn Stars when a first edition of Oscar Wilde's 'The Happy Prince' is brought into the shop. Then, Corey steps into the ring with a 1972 telegram that rejects Muhammad Ali from fighting in Alaska.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawn Awakens
programme.desc: A one-of-a-kind 'Star Wars' packaged Boba Fett prototype strides into the shop, and an early 1900s Shelby bicycle wheels in. Then, Steve Grad wows Rick with his otherworldly 'Star Wars' autographed poster and massive card collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn or Bust
programme.desc: A bust of Marlon Brando has Rick making its owner an offer he can't refuse. It's game on with the Pawn Stars when a Donkey Kong penny bank from the early 1980s barrels into the store. Rick spots a cyclops print made by a member of the band Devo.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Revolutionary Rick!
programme.desc: The 500th episode of the series finds Rick in the nation's capital. A set of silver spoons made by Paul Revere is a rare find. Back at 'Gold and Silver,' a conversational candle prop from 'H.R. Pufnstuf' creates intrigue.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Frontier Fortune
programme.desc: Strum along with the Pawn Stars when a Gibson lap steel guitar jams into the shop. Next, a letter from pioneer Ezra Meeker and a set of commemorative Oregon Trail coins trek on in. Then, a Victorian snuff box shows up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spider Pawn
programme.desc: Rick looks into the authenticity of a rare 1936 Zippo prototype. Corey's wants to snag an antique rotary phone for the right price. Chumlee meets Marvel Comics creator and legendary writer Stan Lee.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Megawatt Money
programme.desc: Two signed David Carradine replica swords; first edition of T.S Eliot's 'Four Quartets'; a 1965 Battle of the Bulge board game; a 1920s radium crock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Top Rope, Bottom Dollar
programme.desc: An ancient tome might hold some alchemist secrets for Rick and Chum. A signed wrestling costume has Corey and Chum debating over its worth. A half dollar claimed to have been dinged by Annie Oakley may be worth its hefty price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Happiest Place to Pawn
programme.desc: An anti-war speech signed by Dr. Martin Luther King stuns Rick and Corey. Rick and Chum check out a remote-controlled miniature version of a Disney Jungle Cruise ride's boat. A German 'Blue Max' medal from WWI has Rick itchy to justify the seller's price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Some Serious Coinage
programme.desc: A sale of the first American coin ever made has Rick thinking it was 'mint' to be, but at a serious cost. Corey and Chum envision a future for an antique 'Jetsons' cartoon lunchbox that is zooming across their counter. Rick gets ancient self-help.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of the Undead
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars stake a claim to an original 1800's Vampire defense kit. Then, Rick gets a chance to buy a work from one of America's most famous artists, James Whistler. Next, Rick takes a look at a James Bond prop from the movie GoldenEye.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: International Pawn of Mystery
programme.desc: Chum gets groovy in Los Angeles while checking out an iconic Austin Powers movie prop. Back at the shop, an Ancient Roman relic marches its way in. Then, Rick tries to make a super deal on an autographed sketch of one of America's very first heroes.

programme.desc: New discoveries in the Amazon are revealing evidence of a long-lost civilization that built giant cities of untold treasures. With the help of the latest tech and cutting-edge archaeology, experts investigate the clues these mysterious people left behind.

programme.title: Cleopatra: Sex, Lies, and Secrets
programme.desc: Special access to a cutting-edge archaeological investigation might reveal the final resting place of Cleopatra's mummy, and using the latest hi-tech science, experts are rethinking everything they know about the mysterious last queen of Egypt.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Search for Nefertiti's Mummy
programme.desc: New technology might help experts track down Nefertiti's missing mummy, an investigation that could reveal new secrets about one of ancient Egypt's most powerful women.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal. Could this stem from a dispute at his other job as a radio DJ? A failing marriage? The possibilities seem endless.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Primal Instinct
programme.desc: When a drunken dispute at a biker bar turns deadly, Kenda must launch a manhunt for a pair of suspects who fled with a small boy in tow. Then a man is murdered in an onslaught of high caliber gunfire, but an unexpected break turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet the slaying of a young boy. After confronting his own demons brought forth by the tragic case, the detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: American Monster: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: The Laffertys are pillars of the Mormon community, and known as a flawless example of wholesome family values, as seen in these never-before-aired home videos. But an evil is lurking that - decades later - will explode into an unholy double homicide.

programme.title: American Monster: Once a Princess
programme.desc: Hyrah Frasch is no ordinary baby. The photogenic one-year-old already has her own website and looks set to become an internet sensation. But when a tragic accident occurs in the family swimming pool, police discover a brutal killer hiding in her midst.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Long Walk, Cold Night
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found murdered after a night out with friend, Police must retrace her final steps to find her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Salt in the Wound
programme.desc: An independent young woman starting out in life on her own, becomes the victim of a bizarre and vicious homicide in her apartment.

programme.title: American Monster: Once a Princess
programme.desc: Hyrah Frasch is no ordinary baby. The photogenic one-year-old already has her own website and looks set to become an internet sensation. But when a tragic accident occurs in the family swimming pool, police discover a brutal killer hiding in her midst.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Long Walk, Cold Night
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found murdered after a night out with friend, Police must retrace her final steps to find her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Murder in Store
programme.desc: A young woman is murdered inside the video game store she managed by a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: American Monster: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, Kevin and Joanne Dowling like to capture their kids' milestones on videotape in their modest suburban home. But when a woman in a nearby town is gunned down - and Kevin is accused of murder - his fate hangs on that same home video camera.

programme.title: Suspicion: Murder in the Family
programme.desc: When young Alan Simpson goes missing in April 1985, his mother Brenda is determined to find him. The last person to see him alive is his stepmother Rosalind, who claims he just vanished into thin air. But Brenda will stop at nothing to get to the truth.

programme.title: Suspicion: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: When Joe Gere hears of a serial killer on the loose, he immediately packs up his family and moves. But even in their new home, Joe is vigilant, and teaches his kids to shoot and defend themselves. But it's not long before he gets the call he's dreaded.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Green-eyed Monsters
programme.desc: For these heartless women envy is the deadliest sin. An obsessed mistress sacrifices her lover's wife; a young lover kills her girlfriend to keep her from the arms of another; and an angry cowgirl destroys her ex's life by destroying his family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: For unsuspecting victims, being too close to their enemies led to their demise.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends to Foes
programme.desc: It's easy to keep friends and enemies close when they're one and the same. These Deadly Women turn from 'Friends to Foes.'

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Family Values
programme.desc: A woman who still lives in her family home befriends her new neighbours, only to be plunged into a nightmare of threats, violence and betrayal. When her brother steps up to protect her, blood will be spilled and lives forever shattered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lies, Lawns & Murder
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a retired Vietnam veteran sells off a piece of his land to a young family. No one can predict the modern day Hatfield McCoy neighbor feud that will ensue and the midnight shootout that will end it.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mistress of Death
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other since childhood descend into bitter conflict when the ex husband of one starts seeing the other. Add property issues to this toxic mix and the result is an act of shocking violence that engulfs all.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Dead Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: A man who is meticulous about his lawn runs into conflict with a new neighbour who doesn't have the same priorities. The feud between the two men viciously escalates, ultimately ending in an episode of shocking violence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: She Made me Do It
programme.desc: As a boy, Eric Witte's father taught him to protect his family. But as his father grows increasingly violent, Eric realizes that he is the evil his family needs protection from.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: On the Run
programme.desc: When Susan Hamlin walks into a police station to confess that she is part of a satanic cult and plans to murder her husband, no one could guess that the truth is even more bizarre and sinister, or that it is all part of her own desperate escape plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Biggest Barn Ever
programme.desc: In Texas, the Barnwood Builders raise the largest timberframe they have ever built by combining wood and steel. Along the way, they battle hundred degree temperatures, and Mark explores a renovated inn with the Junk Gypsies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Design Special
programme.desc: Together, Mark and Karen visit several log homes finished to perfection.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving the Last Cabin in Roanoke to a Local Resort
programme.desc: Mark and the guys go way beyond the call of duty to save the last cabin from the old town of Roanoke, West Virginia. The Fox sisters show up and to watch their father's boyhood home get moves to a local four-diamond resort.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Complicated Carriage House
programme.desc: The builders pull into New Ringgold, Pennsylvania, in a covered wagon, ready to take down and move a very complicated carriage house.

programme.desc: The Moss brothers create a new backyard for a couple who are all about modern design and relaxation. Zen like planters, a tranquil, backlit water feature, privacy screens and lush landscaping leading to an inviting spa create a modern relaxation zone.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach
programme.desc: Jim and Tina have purchased a 1930s beach cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware for their family. The house has a few charming touches, but a lot of aesthetic and structural issues.

programme.title: I Want That!: Builders, Kitchen and Bath Show
programme.desc: Be the first in the know about the latest high-tech gadgets and design trends.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Fertile Fields to the Red River Valley
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota where he goes local with the North Woods Sandwich and Barbe-chos, and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the Redneck Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Shepherd's Pie And Sunday Dinner Sundaes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off at the Big E in West Springfield, Mass., where he 'meats up' with a deconstructed Turducken Sandwich and the award-winning country fried shepherd's pie.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Mighty Meatless
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe finds veggie-friendly treats that don't need meat to be indulgent. He tries plenty of delicious, salad-inspired snacks on fairgrounds across the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seafood Sampler
programme.desc: Noah Cappe dives into the fairground for some of the yummiest seafood snacks on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beach Eats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe goes surfside for a coastal fairground adventure. He'll sample creative beach eats from midway vendors all around the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King's Peach
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the Big Fresno Fair in California, where local legend Chicken Charlie has a triple treat stacked up on a stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: You've Got Ale
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Wisconsin State Fair, where a local brewery is serving the ultimate deep-fried combo of beer, brats and cheese curds.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Best of the Fests
programme.desc: From big, bold Hawaiian burgers at the Bite of Seattle and slammin' sausages in St. Louis to the biggest crawfish boil in Louisiana, there's almost too much to eat at these food festivals across the nation.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Ooey Gooey Greatness
programme.desc: From majorly melty mac and cheese to fudgy, chewy triple chocolate cookies, diners are living the gooey good life at these restaurants across the nation.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: New Friends
programme.desc: Tia Mowry recently met Catherine McCord and they instantly hit it off. It's not hard to see why; they have a lot of mutual friends and are both busy moms who love to cook.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Cory's Guys
programme.desc: Tia Mowry's husband, Cory, has a lot of single actor friends who rarely get to enjoy a home-cooked meal. Tia's invited them over for a cookout by the pool and she's putting Cory in charge of the grill.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Tia's Guilty Pleasures Day
programme.desc: Tia Mowry's treating herself to a day of decadence and is indulging in some of her favorite foods. She starts her day with a stop to a popular doughnut shop before heading home to make her own salted caramel swirl ice cream with spiced pecans.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Best Morning Ever
programme.desc: Tia's best girls enjoy a healthy and flavorful Sunday-funday brunch after practicing some tips to stay fit. Including: fresh fruit smoothie, banana pancakes with blistered berries, flavorful quinoa breakfast bowl with shitakes, and crispy kale chips.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Date Night
programme.desc: Tia and her husband play in the kitchen. He'll surprise her with one of his recipes but Tia won't be outdone.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Grillin' Out With Dad
programme.desc: Tia spends time with her dad, Tim. Tim helps Tia recreate one of their favorite barbecue recipes and Tia stops by an Asian market to pick up their favorite side dish.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bloody Bite Size Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby's small-plates-inspired menu will make sure his each of his guests gets a taste of something delicious. Bobby starts with crispy bacon and hash brown quesadillas with fried quail eggs.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch That Does a Body Good
programme.desc: As a chef constantly surrounded by food, it's important for Bobby to keep healthy options in mind... even when it comes to brunch! Bobby's fitness-minded menu is filled with some of his favourite ingredients.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on the Run
programme.desc: A busy weekend schedule doesn't prevent Chef Bobby Flay from enjoying the brunch experience, even on the go. Take anywhere dishes include cinnamon sugar French toast sticks with maple cream, and a pressed egg sandwich.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Big Apple Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a little inspiration from his hometown to create a versatile and delicious 'Big Apple' brunch. His apple-themed menu features irresistible apple cider donuts, apple sauce parfaits with yogurt and crispy quinoa, and eggs benedict.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dumplings & Pumpkins
programme.desc: Noah's first stop is at the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee, where he feels the burn with dead heat tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bowls and Rolls
programme.desc: The Norfolk County Fair in Ontario, Canada, is a culinary carnival of good eats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The French Toast Connection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the San Diego County fair in California, for breakfast with a bang, indulging in French toast bacon bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the annual Rio Rancho Pork and Brew festival in New Mexico.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Children of the Corn on the Cob
programme.desc: From enchilada funnel cake to bacon bbq, Noah Cappe samples the menu at the Three Rivers Festival in Fort Wayne.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Point Break-Fast
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts the day right at the Shasta District Fair in Anderson, California.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Marketplace / Mystery in the Sand Dunes
programme.desc: When Meena wants to make special ladoos for her father's homecoming party, Mira must help track down the spice merchant who has an essential ingredient. Then, while testing Neel's new vehicle in the desert, a sandstorm causes it to become lost.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Tell Me Sweet Little Lies
programme.desc: Christina is hesitant to move in with Burke, and George threatens to move out unless Meredith gets rid of their dog. Meanwhile, Alex gets his board-exam results, Meredith takes a blood test for Alzheimer's, and Bailey begins to have contractions.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Break on Through
programme.desc: The nurses at Seattle Grace Hospital go on strike, leaving the doctors to fend for themselves. Meredith's mistake in treating an elderly patient is brought to light by the patient's friends. Meanwhile, Izzy treats a pregnant teen.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: It's the End of the World
programme.desc: Meredith's fear that she's in for a bad day when a medical case arrives at Seattle Grace that threatens the lives of everyone in the operating room.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: As We Know It
programme.desc: Despite the best efforts of Seattle Grace's staff, the code black situation escalates.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Yesterday
programme.desc: Someone from Derek and Addison's past arrives in Seattle and shakes things up. Meanwhile, Burke learns about Christina's secret. After a visit with her mother, Meredith looks into more of her family's dirty little secrets.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: What Have I Done to Deserve This?
programme.desc: Meredith and George suddenly find themselves at odds at work. Bailey, although technically on maternity leave, finds herself treating Addison for an unusual feminine issue. Alex finds himself oddly jealous when Izzie pays more attention to Denny.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Knock Your Block Off
programme.desc: The MSO steps up to the challenge after larger-than-life Chris Block challenges them to switch to small tires and compete against South Carolina. With little time to prepare, Memphis must quickly adapt or risk losing to Block's mind games.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Small is the New Big
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content -- the MSO prepares to take on a long list of tough small-tire racers as they learn to master small-tire racing themselves. The team must learn quickly, however, if they want to stand a chance against the seasoned pros.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Small Tire Take Over
programme.desc: The MSO's big plans to race only on small tires is put to the test when Tim White and his small-tire killers from Illinois roll into town.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Race Night in America
programme.desc: First, Tim White from Illinois revisits Memphis with a big surprise. Afterwards catch the underground scene as racers hit the local streets during Race Night In America.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Back With a Kodiak
programme.desc: Diesel Dave picks his first giveaway truck and dreams big attempting to build the 2020 version of the Kodiak. Todd LeDuc challenges the guys to a desert race and flips the script by picking The Muscle to be on his team.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Epic Fail of the Year
programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz pick up a vintage fire truck to transform into a tow truck that can carry everyone in the shop. Heavy D is determined to finish the endless Fail of the Year UTV build.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Race Night in America
programme.desc: First, Tim White from Illinois revisits Memphis with a big surprise. Afterwards catch the underground scene as racers hit the local streets during Race Night In America.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Back With a Kodiak
programme.desc: Diesel Dave picks his first giveaway truck and dreams big attempting to build the 2020 version of the Kodiak. Todd LeDuc challenges the guys to a desert race and flips the script by picking The Muscle to be on his team.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Flippin' Diesel
programme.desc: The diesel brothers are up against the clock for their SEMA build: a replica Ford Bronco made from an F350 and an Excursion. Heavy D brings in physics help to make his dream of a somersaulting truck come true.

programme.title: Redwood Kings: Mineshaft Zipline
programme.desc: Zigzagging around a 17,000-acre ranch in California is a series of adrenaline-pumping ziplines. Ron and John take the adventure to another level by creating a Gold Rush-era-themed zipline, while John also carves a smoke breathing, eye-glowing tiki.

programme.title: Redwood Kings: Ozarks Showdown
programme.desc: Gunfights, fist fights and a flaming cabin. All in a night's work for the Shepherd of the Hills stage show in Branson, Missouri. The Daniels Wood Land crew adds to this historic attraction with a one-of-a-kind hillbilly shooting gallery.

programme.title: Redwood Kings: The Wood Life
programme.desc: Ron and John's mom needs an old oak tree removed before it falls on the family house. While John takes us on an insider's guide to the magic that makes this company one of the best in the treehouse and theming business.

programme.title: Redwood Kings: Hog Wild in the Heartland
programme.desc: After creating countless works of wonder from fallen Redwoods and metal trash, John Daniels and his crew launch their most extreme project to date. An Indiana pig farm wants a cartoon-style clubhouse in freezing conditions.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Chaos Before the Storm
programme.desc: Winter is approaching yet the Wolfpack is feeling the heat! Bear works furiously to finalize an addition to his home as Billy faces a new medical crisis. A big winter storm forces Noah and Rhain Alisha to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Big Push
programme.desc: The Brown siblings struggle to finish their ambitious homesites as the ground begins to freeze. Later, the Wolfpack gets the call that Rhain-Alisha has gone into labor and races to the birth of baby Eli.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: A Murder in Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Erik Menendez himself shares in stunning detail the events of the week leading up to the murders of his parents and the motive behind the crime that shocked America.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: A Family With a Dirty Secret
programme.desc: The trial of the century takes a shocking turn when the defense says Erik and Lyle Menendez killed their parents after years of sexual abuse. Erik tells his harrowing account of growing up in the Menendez 'house of horrors.'

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: Abuse Excuse?
programme.desc: Erik Menendez recalls his mother's decline in the years leading up to the murders and looks on in agony as his brother, Lyle testifies, vividly describing the abuse at the hands of their father.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: Trials and Reversals
programme.desc: The first trial ends in a stunning surprise verdict. Erik takes us inside the prep for his second trial, his unlikely connection with OJ Simpson, and why he alone is left to speak for both the brothers as another jury debates life in prison or death.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All: Final Verdict
programme.desc: After the verdict comes in, at the last minute, Erik Menendez and his brother, Lyle, are sent to separate prisons. Erik marries and begins to mount an appeal.

programme.title: Elizabeth Smart: Autobiography: Part One
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart explains her story in her own words and provides previously untold details about her infamous abduction and nine-month nightmare in the grasps of her cruel captors.

programme.title: Elizabeth Smart: Autobiography: Part Two
programme.desc: Elizabeth tells the story of traveling to Southern California with her captors, their return to Utah, and her harrowing rescue with the help of 'America's Most Wanted.'

programme.title: The Killing of JonBenet: The Truth Uncovered: Her Father Speaks
programme.desc: Never-before-seen case details, including John Ramsey's response to the recent media coverage surrounding the 20th anniversary of JonBenét's brutal death, and stunning DNA evidence that sheds new light.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: The Work Life
programme.desc: Matthew and Abbi get to work so we can conquer the nine-to-five routine like a champ. Learn how to crush it with co-workers, find a path to productivity, and even how to drink on the job.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: Taking Risks
programme.desc: From determining what type of risk-taker you are to knowing how your brain impacts risky behavior, this episode will make you an expert at taking chances.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: Weed 101
programme.desc: Matt and Abbi get us high on cannabis knowledge by schooling us on all things weed. Plus, Matt gets high for science and then tests the best methods for sobering up.

programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Last Ditch Effort
programme.desc: Kim undergoes one final procedure on her uterus in an attempt to carry another baby, but suffers from dangerous complications. Meanwhile, Khloe worries that if her new denim line does not meet its high sales expectations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part One)
programme.desc: Kim begins to ease back into her public life, but is blindsided by some upsetting news about Kanye. Meanwhile, Khloé is pressured to mend her relationship with Cait, the family speculate over Kourtney and Scott, and Rob welcomes his first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part Two)
programme.desc: After receiving some troubling news about Kanye while in New York for the Angel Ball, Kim rushes home to his aid. Meanwhile, Kendall worries that a bad review could jeopardize her modeling career, and Khloé clashes with Malika over priorities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex Files
programme.desc: After an explosive fight between Rob and Chyna, the sisters feel like it is their duty to protect their brother from a toxic relationship. Meanwhile, Kris tries to rebuild her relationship with Cait, but is blindsided by some hurtful allegations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Scott is devastated when he hears a rumor that Kourtney is hooking up with another guy and spirals back into old vices. After taking some personal time following the robbery, Kim is back to work but is reluctant to be in the public eye anymore.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy

programme.title: Big Time Bake: Food Fight
programme.desc: Tension mounts as four bakers attempt to use savoury foods in their cookies, cupcakes and showpiece cake. 'Spring Baking Championship' winner Nacho Aguirre joins the judges to determine a winner.

programme.desc: The force is strong as Duff and the decorators engineer a robot cake for a Star Wars-themed robotics competition. Meanwhile, the grill heats up at the bakery to prepare a sweet treat for a BBQ Battle between the LA Fire and Police Departments.

programme.title: Duff Takes the Cake: Soccer, Scotsmen and Cake, Oh My!
programme.desc: Duff Goldman creates a larger-than-life soccer ball with a tasty interior for a group of kids at the LA Galaxy's home stadium. Then, Duff and the team get into shipshape to deliver a five-foot-long replica of The Queen Mary for the Scots Festival.

programme.title: Duff Takes the Cake: It's No Cake Walk

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Winter's Grip

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: Due to record-low inventory in the Los Angeles real estate market, Josh Flagg and the Altman Brothers are forced out of their comfort zone. Altman lands the palatial home in Bradbury Estates, but a major mistake threatens his open house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Hashtag Sell This B*tch!
programme.desc: Josh Altman has high rollers from Chicago in town, looking to wheel and deal. If Altman can't find their dream house for an insane best deal, he'll walk away with nothing. James and David have re-strategized their listing with a giant open house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Two Tops Never Work
programme.desc: Flagg is forced to co-list with rival realtor (and 'Real Househusband') Mauricio Umansky. Tracy lands a dream listing in Brentwood that quickly turns into a nightmare, as Altman gets an offer on his mansion in the Bradbury Estates that just might work.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Homewood's Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Tracy battles two brokers from her past to sell a problematic listing in Brentwood. James lands a classic Beverly Hills home, but the owner has some old-school demands. Madison introduces Cody to the entire family, and pops a big question.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Who's Your Daddy?
programme.desc: Josh Flagg struggles to find the balance between planning his wedding and juggling over-the-top clients. Tracy has a listing with a first-time developer with high expectations. The Altmans race to the hospital as their baby daughter is born.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: It Wasn't in My Budget!
programme.desc: James and David make a pitch to represent the hottest new high rise building in Los Angeles. A wealthy socialite with tight purse strings sees Madison for a summer rental. Tracy's client wants to sell two properties, but has lofty expectations on price.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Mile High Club
programme.desc: Josh and Matt Altman land the biggest mansion in Bradbury Estates. Madison battles structural problems and mold to sell a friend's house in Brentwood. The Brits throw a party for their penthouse listings, but sparks fly when Altman and Flagg face off.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets in the Stars
programme.desc: New innovations in astronomy and space exploration are revealing the secrets of our universe's most mysterious stars, and using the latest cutting-edge science, experts are rethinking everything we know about these cosmic powerhouses.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Supernovas
programme.desc: The universe is expanding and so is our understanding of it. In this brand new episode, up to date information on the big bang is given. The universe grew from a point, smaller than an atomic particle, to the vast cosmos we see today.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Stars That Kill
programme.desc: The universe is home to real-life Death Stars that could destroy planet Earth. The latest science reveals the terrifying secrets of NASA's six deadliest: vampire stars, supernovas that can vaporize a planet, and unpredictable stars gone rogue.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth's Death Orbit
programme.desc: Earth's journey through the universe is a perilous one. New discoveries reveal that our planet is heading toward a mysterious area of the cosmos that could eject us out of the Milky Way and into oblivion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Last Stars
programme.desc: Our universe's stars are dying off faster than new ones are born, and using the latest technology, experts investigate the secrets of the last stars of the cosmos and what this stellar apocalypse means for life on earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Valentich/ Texas Blue Dogs
programme.desc: A pilot and his light aircraft disappear from the skies above southern Australia in 1978. In Texas, blue-eyed and hunch backed creatures have mutilated livestock since 2004.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Shadow People and the Sun Miracle
programme.desc: Shadow People are a phenomenon that is becoming more widely reported in the U.S. Preston Castle appears to be haunted by them. Then, witnesses claim the sun above Medjugorje is defying the laws of nature.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secret
programme.desc: Danyall White tells the gripping true story of her brother Richard. Danyall always thought he was a prankster who told stories. But when his stories started getting more and more violent, she slowly realized that her brother was hiding a monstrous secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Blood Atonement
programme.desc: Estephania LeBaron was raised to believe that her father and brothers were holy men, and that the terrible things they did in God's name were just. But she questions everything when faced with having to do the same terrible things herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Not My Boy
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller never suspected that the man terrorizing their city could be a member of their own family. As it dawns on them that their son is hiding a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Marked for Murder
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when an esteemed criminal law professor and father of two, is executed in his garage. Investigators follow a series of leads that take them on a statewide hunt through Florida, in search of the murderous masterminds.

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Not My Boy
programme.desc: George and Margaret Keller never suspected that the man terrorizing their city could be a member of their own family. As it dawns on them that their son is hiding a sinister secret, they must decide whether or not to turn him in.

programme.title: Twisted: Killer Cousins
programme.desc: Cousins Waterfield and Gore hunted women in Vero Beach, Florida. Their perverse and violent acts resulted in the sexual abuse and murder of 6 young women before Gore was caught.

programme.title: Twisted: Twisted Tourniquet
programme.desc: Women in Virginia were told to nail their windows shut in order to protect themselves from the 'Southside strangler' Timothy Spencer who climbed in through windows to kill his victims in their homes.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder in the Chat Room
programme.desc: In the wake of a broken marriage, 28-year old Samantha Lezark's struggle to find love again has a fatal ending. Now, investigators must follow her digital trail through different chat rooms to uncover her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Killer Chemistry
programme.desc: Professor Tiffany Maher is a faculty favorite; intelligent and sociable, it's hard to believe that she could have any enemies. But when Tiffany is murdered, investigators discover a secret online life that may lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: November 2014, Tiffanie Adams' body is found in a field. A small town sheriff must retrace the expectant mom's steps to catch a cold blooded killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunter
programme.desc: When Kelli Bordeaux didn't report for duty at Ft. Bragg, everyone knew something must be wrong. The young combat medic would never go AWOL. A bounty hunter, working as a private eye, would then develop an unusual relationship with the suspect.reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the death of a young wife and wonder if she committed suicide to be free from a sham marriage or did someone in her husband's alleged religious cult want her dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A couple's mountain hike turns into a tragedy and the woman's boyfriend is charged with her murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Point Blank
programme.desc: Scott Rhode thought his wife Traci, was cheating and moved the family five times in thirteen years. When Traci met yet another man, 'a friend,' Scott called for divorce and custody of the kids but mysteriously died of a gunshot to the head a day later.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: A fire chief's wife is found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy reveals the cause of death was not the fire, but a gunshot to the head, shocking this small Louisiana town. This arson turned homicide leaves a killer to be found.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Risk-Takers and Renegades
programme.desc: It's a five-round battle to name the most badass of them all. In one corner, Evel Knievel, the original daredevil with the record for most broken bones takes on the People's President, Andrew Jackson, the Billionaire Howard Hughes and General Patton.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: It's the final five-round battle of the season to name who's the most Badass. In one corner, George Washington, our first President takes on notorious General Douglas MacArthur and Amelia Earhart takes on boxing legend Jack Johnson.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Fight or Flight

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Vices and Vacations
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we explore the myths surrounding our favorite vices and learn the facts behind some of our favorite holidays.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.
